scripts.lint: eslint apps packages scripts e2e playwright.config.ts --max-warnings 0
scripts.planning:verify: corepack pnpm planning:check && corepack pnpm planning:test
scripts.security:p13a: corepack pnpm build && vitest run apps/server/src/app.test.ts apps/web/src/core-ui.test.tsx apps/web/src/changes-ui.test.tsx apps/web/src/hostile-content.test.tsx packages/git-client/src/malicious-repository.test.ts packages/gitlab/src/index.test.ts packages/publishing/src/index.test.ts && corepack pnpm audit --prod --audit-level high
scripts.security:verify: corepack pnpm --filter @gitpm/security build && vitest run packages/security/src/security-boundary.test.ts && node scripts/security-spike-report.mjs
scripts.verify:local: corepack pnpm install --frozen-lockfile && corepack pnpm verify
scripts.verify: corepack pnpm clean && corepack pnpm build && corepack pnpm lint && corepack pnpm typecheck:after-build && corepack pnpm test && corepack pnpm e2e && corepack pnpm smoke && corepack pnpm schema:verify && node scripts/security-spike-report.mjs && corepack pnpm planning:verify
